rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Deploy","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Deploys the full LockVault protocol using two-step VaultToken initialisation:   1. VaultToken   \u2014 deployed without a minter; deployer holds the one-time setVault() right   2. MembershipNFT   3. LockVault    \u2014 core protocol   4. setVault()   \u2014 wire LockVault as the authorised VaultToken minter (permanent)   5. MockERC20    \u2014 mock staking asset   6. MockPriceFeed \u2014 $1.00 price feed   7. Wire-up      \u2014 whitelist staking token with price feed Usage (local Anvil):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 \\     --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast Usage (testnet, e.g., Sepolia):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $SEPOLIA_RPC_URL \\     --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast --verify Environment variables required:   PRIVATE_KEY  \u2014 deployer private key (hex, without 0x prefix)   TREASURY     \u2014 treasury address; falls back to deployer if
